allow: PowerShell($env:BROWSER='none'; $p = Start-Process npm -ArgumentList 'run','dev' -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\vite_out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\vite_err.txt" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\vite_out.txt" -Tail 15; "---ERR---"; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\vite_err.txt" -Tail 15; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5173/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "HTTP " + $r.StatusCode } catch { "req: $_" }; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force 2>$null; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.StartTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(-1\) } | Stop-Process -Force 2>$null)

PowerShell($env:BROWSER='none'; $p = Start-Process npm -ArgumentList 'run','dev','--','--port','3020' -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\v2_out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\v2_err.txt" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; "---OUT---"; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\v2_out.txt" -Tail 8; "---ERR---"; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\v2_err.txt" -Tail 8; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3020/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "HOME HTTP " + $r.StatusCode } catch { "home: $_" }; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force 2>$null)
